title: acer tonkinense subsp. liquidambarifolium
intro: Acer tonkinense subsp. liquidambarifolium, also known as the Liquidambar-leafed maple, is a plant species belonging to the Sapindaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, due to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Acer tonkinense subsp. liquidambarifolium include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to prevent cardiovascular diseases and protect against cell damage. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
